raw_text:
Ben: Hi Ryan, thanks for reaching out. What's brought you to looking at a platform like ours?

Ryan: Honestly we're a small team — about 50 warehouse and logistics staff. We're trying to get away from spreadsheets for scheduling. I came across your product online.

Ben: Got it. So around 50 users to start. What kind of budget are you working with?

Ryan: We're quite budget conscious at the moment. I'd say we're looking at maybe $20,000 for the year, possibly a bit more if we can justify it to management. But I should be honest — I'm not the final decision maker. That would be our MD, Sandra Nguyen. I haven't actually got sign-off from her yet to even be evaluating this.

Ben: I see. Is there a timeline you're working to?

Ryan: Not really. It's more exploratory at this point. Sandra's focus is on other priorities right now. I wouldn't expect anything to move quickly — maybe something to revisit later in the year if things change.

Ben: Understood. Our entry-level option for 50 users would be around $25,000 annually. It's worth me sending over some information so you have it ready for when you do speak with Sandra.

Ryan: Sure, that would be helpful. I'll pass it on to her when the time is right.
